---
title: max-control-nesting
description: "Limit nested control structures."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Limit nested control structures. Strider default: maximum depth 5.

## Bad

```go
if ready { for { switch value { case 1: if valid { process() } } } }
```

## Good

```go
if !ready { return }
for _, item := range items { process(item) }
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only max-control-nesting`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
